allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add container base image with user-writable npm/pip paths

- Debian Bookworm-slim base with Python 3.14 and Node.js 22.x LTS
- Non-root ''dev'' user \(UID/GID 1000\) with sudo access
- Configure npm global prefix to ~/.npm-global for sudo-free installs
- Add ~/.local/bin and ~/.npm-global/bin to PATH for user packages
- Include health check script and acceptance test suite
- All 25 acceptance tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
